task_completion.description: Navigate to the Jefferson Industrial Coatings facility record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Data Manager application open to the facility record for 'Jefferson Industrial Coatings'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Hydrochloric Acid chemical record
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the inventory or chemical record specifically for 'Hydrochloric Acid' within the 'Jefferson Industrial Coatings' facility.

task_completion.description: Enter the storage location and storage type
task_completion.visual_evidence: A storage location form is visible with 'East Production Building - Tank Farm' in the location field and 'Above ground tank' selected or entered for the storage type.

task_completion.description: Enter the pressure and temperature conditions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The storage location form shows 'Ambient pressure' and 'Ambient temperature' selected or entered in their respective fields.

task_completion.description: Enter the maximum amount, average daily amount, and days on site
task_completion.visual_evidence: The storage location form shows '10000' in the maximum amount field, '6500' in the average daily amount field, and '365' in the days on site field.

task_completion.description: Save the new storage location entry
task_completion.visual_evidence: A summary screen, list, or confirmation shows that the new storage location with the entered details has been successfully saved to the Hydrochloric Acid record.

integrity.description: Agent used the application GUI rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface. There should be no terminal windows showing database insertion commands (e.g., SQL INSERT statements).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine application
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs were entered into the actual CAMEO Data Manager application fields, not typed into a text editor, notepad, or a web browser.

integrity.description: Agent did not directly edit the backend database
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a database viewer (like DB Browser for SQLite) to directly edit the backend database file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Hydrochloric Acid is a real industrial chemical. The storage specifications provided in the task are realistic and verified against industrial standards: 'Above ground tank' is a valid storage type, 'Ambient pressure' and 'Ambient temperature' are the correct and safe conditions for HCl, and the amounts (10000 max, 6500 avg) fall within the standard industrial storage range of 35-20,000 gallons. The facility 'Jefferson Industrial Coatings' is a synthetic test case.
